changes: updates feed: new entries from the daily check-in
Aspect-adaptive spacing: the node grid reshapes to fill any screen or window size, phone to ultrawide
Mobile panel is now a half-height bottom sheet with drag to expand or dismiss, keeping the map visible
Larger starting zoom everywhere and bigger touch targets on every node

v3: the terminal grew into a skill map. The homepage is now an interactive node map: a center card with a waving pixel swaygent, eight color-coded sections on an arc, leaf nodes that fan out per section, and a slide-in panel that carries everything the terminal knew.
Second-layer skill web: each skill group fans out its individual skills on the canvas, cross-linked to the projects that prove them.
Animated pipeline walk with per-stage glyphs, pinch zoom and zoom controls, a compact phone layout, and a dedicated print route that keeps the one-page resume PDF gates intact.
